entity.summary: Multichain decentralized exchange protocol formerly known as CrocSwap, combining concentrated, constant-product ambient, and knockout liquidity in a single-contract AMM architecture.
entity.notes: HEI models Ambient, Ambient Finance, CrocSwap, its single-contract DEX architecture, and chain deployments as one continuing entity. Current activity after the June 2026 protocol incident supports active rather than impaired classification; that incident is not assigned an exact HEI event without a separate event-evidence review.

evidence.title: Introduction to Ambient
evidence.notes: Current first-party documentation identifies Ambient as the former CrocSwap and describes its single-contract DEX with concentrated, ambient constant-product, knockout, dynamic-fee, and permissioned-pool liquidity primitives.

evidence.title: Ambient protocol trading metrics
evidence.notes: Independent metrics report current non-zero multichain TVL, fees, and DEX volume across Scroll, Ethereum, Blast, Canto, and other deployments, corroborating active exchange operation.
